opening_line: Flagging this account for immediate attention — our latest review has surfaced some concerning patterns.
body_paragraph: Recent feedback from the customer has highlighted some gaps between their expectations and what has been delivered. While the technical metrics look healthy, the relationship sentiment does not reflect that. We need to bridge this perception gap before the renewal conversation.
closing_line: Let us align on a response plan this week so we can address this before it escalates further.
